note_on_data: Reconstructed retro. 3rd product-loop run; first to exercise the new design-iteration Gate C end-to-end. Shipped v1.1.0.

design.note: ux-designer Gate-C audit vs two-tier master → prioritized patch set + edge verdict (positive)

build.note: clean first try (no new files); L3 auto-regen + L4 SIGN-CHECK held (3rd run)

release.note: v1.1.0 committed + tagged; main still held

defects.title: ModelCard tag label = accent on accent tint (3.11:1 AA fail)
defects.root_cause: indicator/accent color used as label text

defects.title: HelpView sheet missing .preferredColorScheme(.dark)+.tint
defects.root_cause: sheet isolation; dark contract not re-applied

defects.title: Three raw .system(size:10) instead of caption token

notes: HEADLINE: the NEW design-iteration Gate C (built this session) worked end-to-end — surfaced a prioritized patch set + an elevation, caught a RECURRING design class (indicator-as-label, 2nd time), and 0 defects escaped to the user. Escape rate 0.25→0.20→0.0 (best). Hard-gate first-pass 1.0 (clean build + clean QA). L3/L4/L5 held a 3rd run. Contrast all measured (WCAG calc).
